2606.28062.title: Single and Multi Truth Data Fusion using Large Language Models
2606.28062.paper_summary: Data fusion, also known as truth discovery, is a data integration problem that aims to determine the correct value or set of values for each attribute of an object when presented with potentially conflicting values from multiple sources. Data fusion tasks belong to two main categories: single-truth scenarios, where each attribute has only one correct value, and multi-truth scenarios, where multiple values can be valid simultaneously. This paper investigates the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) in data fusion tasks for tabular data. Various prompting strategies, encompassing both single-truth and multi-truth scenarios, are investigated empirically. Domain-dependent, domain-independent, zero-shot and one-shot prompts are evaluated on three different benchmark datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that LLM-based approaches outperform traditional unsupervised truth discovery methods, such as DART and LTM, across all datasets. The codebase of this study has been made publicly available on GitHub.
2606.28062.paper_summary_zh: 資料融合，也稱為真相發現，是一種數據整合問題，旨在當面對來自多個來源的潛在衝突值時，確定每個物件屬性的正確值或值集。<lb/>資料融合任務主要分為兩個類別：單一真相場景，其中每個屬性只有一個正確值，以及多重真相場景，其中多個值可以同時有效。<lb/>本文探討了大型語言模型（LLMs）在表格數據資料融合任務中的應用。<lb/>各種提示策略，包括單一真相和多重真相場景，均進行了實證研究。<lb/>基於領域的、無領域的、零樣本和一次性提示在三個不同的基準數據集上進行了評估。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，基於LLM的方法在所有數據集上均優於傳統的無監督真相發現方法，如DART和LTM。<lb/>本研究的代碼庫已在GitHub上公開。
2606.28062.author: Hira Beril Kucuk et.al.
2606.28062.authors: Hira Beril Kucuk, Norman W Paton, Jiaoyan Chen, Zhenyu Wu
